title: Here are 3 big things to watch in the stock market this coming week
summary: Key market events this week include FedEx earnings and the release of the Fed's preferred inflation gauge, both of which could influence investor sentiment and market movements.
content: FedEx reports earnings, and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge is due out.

zh.title: 股市本周需要关注的3个重大事项
zh.summary: 本周关键市场事件包括联邦快递的财报和美联储首选通胀指标的公布，这两者都可能影响投资者情绪和市场走势。

title: The best parents and leaders use a 3-step formula to help people handle uncertainty, says Dr. Becky Kennedy
summary: Dr. Becky Kennedy outlines a 3-step formula parents and leaders can use to help others manage uncertainty by reframing situations positively. The approach focuses on communication rather than controlling outcomes.
content: Even if you can't control an outcome, you can still help your child or co-worker feel more at ease with uncertainty, just by how you describe a situation.

zh.title: 贝基·肯尼迪博士表示，最优秀的父母和领导者使用3步公式帮助他人应对不确定性
zh.summary: 贝基·肯尼迪博士概述了父母和领导者可以使用的3步公式，通过积极改进来帮助他人管理不确定性。该方法侧重于沟通而非控制结果。

title: ‘I’ll probably be working until I die’: I’m 60, work as a waiter and have $2,000 in a Roth IRA. What will happen to me?
summary: A 60-year-old waiter with only $2,000 in retirement savings expresses fear about their financial future and ability to retire. The article examines the challenges facing late-career workers with minimal retirement assets.
content: “I’m afraid I’m in a bad place.”

zh.title: "我可能会工作到死"：我60岁，做服务员，罗斯IRA账户只有2000美元。我会怎样？
zh.summary: 一位只有2000美元退休储蓄的60岁服务员表达了对其财务未来和退休能力的担忧。本文审视了拥有最少退休资产的晚期职业工作者面临的挑战。

title: The secret to wellness is simple: Eat this breakfast and work out at the right time
summary: Contrary to popular timing-based wellness advice, research suggests what you eat for breakfast matters more than when you eat it. The focus on nutrition composition over meal timing offers a simpler approach to wellness.
content: The key to a healthy breakfast is less about when you eat it and more about what you eat.

zh.title: 健康的秘诀很简单：吃对早餐，在对的时间锻炼
zh.summary: 与流行的时间相关健康建议相反，研究表明早餐吃什么比何时吃更重要。专注于营养成分而非进餐时间为健康提供了更简单的方法。

title: UK minister says PM Starmer is considering 'political realities' amid leadership pressure
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces mounting leadership pressure after former Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a parliamentary seat. Government ministers cite "political realities" as the PM considers his position.
content: The threat to Starmer's position increased sharply on Friday when former Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a seat in parliament.

zh.title: 英国部长表示首相斯塔默在面临领导力压力下考虑"政治现实"
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默在前大曼彻斯特市长安迪·伯纳姆赢得议会席位后面临越来越大的领导力压力。政府部长引用"政治现实"，称首相正在考虑其职位。

title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
summary: Top Wall Street analysts have identified three dividend-paying stocks recommended by TipRanks as attractive investments for stable returns. The analysis highlights dividend-paying equities favored by leading market experts.

zh.title: 顶级华尔街分析师看好这3只分红股票获得稳健回报
zh.summary: 顶级华尔街分析师已确定了TipRanks推荐的三只分红股票作为稳定回报的吸引力投资。该分析突出了领先市场专家青睐的分红股票。

title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
summary: Kevin Warsh is quietly reshaping the Federal Reserve through announced changes and task forces designed to fundamentally rethink Fed operations. The reforms represent significant institutional change implemented with minimal public attention.
content: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.

zh.title: "穿着天鹅绒手套的政权更替"：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
zh.summary: 凯文·沃什通过宣布的改革和特别工作组，悄悄地重塑美联储，旨在从根本上重新思考美联储的运作方式。这些改革代表了在最少公众关注下实施的重大制度变革。
